evidence: "It is so much fun to watch the aspiring chefs grow and improve under Ramsey's mentoring."
"A thriller with a creepy, ancient twist. Brilliantly written and acted."
"If you need to fall asleep, watch this for an hour. Same story over and over. Boring. Repetitive."
"Watch the first two seasons, but skip the third. It was a fantastic show, well written with excellent acting up to that point."
"A definite 'must watch.' Be prepared to lose a day or two because you will feel the inescapable desire to binge watch the entire season."
"Each season is better than the last. I just finished binge watching, and I already am dying to find out what happens next season."
"Great acting; interesting plot. Set in Paris (which is almost another character on and off the screen), it follows a family's struggle to succeed..."
"The story and the characters are so well developed. I am addicted and hope for many more seasons to come!"
"Amazing. The story and the characters are so well developed."

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced, high-quality shows with simple narratives and strong emotional resonance. They appreciate well-developed characters and engaging plots, particularly in the reality, comedy, and thriller genres.
